law_name: Fair Rental Law of 2017 (חוק שכירות הוגנת)

rules.rule: Maximum security deposit is 3 months rent OR 1/3 of total lease value (whichever is lower)
rules.check_question: Does the contract require a deposit exceeding 3 months rent?

rules.rule: Deposit must be returned within 60 days after lease ends
rules.check_question: Does the contract specify deposit return period over 60 days?

rules.rule: Rent cannot be increased during active lease without explicit contract clause
rules.check_question: Does the contract allow arbitrary rent increases during lease term?

rules.rule: Late payment penalties must be reasonable (typically max 2% per week)
rules.check_question: Are late payment penalties excessive (over 5% per week)?

rules.rule: Landlord must give reasonable notice (24-48 hours) before entering property
rules.source: Tenant Privacy Rights, Israeli Civil Law
rules.check_question: Does the contract allow landlord entry without reasonable notice (less than 24h)?

rules.rule: Subletting restrictions must be reasonable; complete prohibition may be unfair
rules.check_question: Does the contract completely prohibit subletting without exception?

rules.rule: Landlord cannot interrupt essential services (electricity, water, gas)
rules.check_question: Does the contract allow landlord to cut off utilities?

rules.rule: Tenant has right to make minor modifications and hang items
rules.check_question: Does the contract prohibit all modifications including hanging pictures?

rules.rule: Tenant early termination notice: typically 60 days
rules.check_question: Does the contract require tenant notice period over 60 days?

rules.rule: Landlord must give 90 days notice for early termination
rules.check_question: Does the contract allow landlord to terminate with less than 90 days notice?

rules.rule: Contract must specify clear conditions for early termination
rules.check_question: Is the early termination clause vague or one-sided?

rules.rule: Tenant cannot be forced to pay remaining rent if finding replacement tenant
rules.check_question: Does the contract require full remaining rent payment even with replacement tenant?

rules.rule: Landlord is responsible for structural and essential repairs
rules.check_question: Does the contract shift all repair responsibility to tenant?

rules.rule: Normal wear and tear is not tenant's responsibility
rules.check_question: Does the contract make tenant liable for normal wear and tear?

rules.rule: Insurance requirements must be reasonable
rules.check_question: Does the contract require tenant to get excessive insurance coverage?

rules.rule: Damage liability must be proportional and documented
rules.check_question: Does the contract allow landlord to claim unlimited damages without proof?

rules.rule: Contract must comply with Fair Rental Law 2017
rules.check_question: Does the contract explicitly violate Fair Rental Law provisions?

rules.rule: Property must meet habitability standards (utilities, ventilation, light, lockable door)
rules.check_question: Does the contract waive habitability requirements?

rules.rule: Lease terms cannot waive statutory tenant protections
rules.check_question: Does the contract contain clauses waiving legal tenant protections?

rules.rule: Both parties must receive signed copy of contract
rules.check_question: Does the contract fail to require both parties keep signed copies?

interpretation.0-30: High Risk - Major legal concerns, strongly recommend legal review
interpretation.31-50: Medium-High Risk - Several concerning clauses need attention
interpretation.51-70: Medium Risk - Some issues to negotiate before signing
interpretation.71-85: Low-Medium Risk - Minor issues, generally acceptable
interpretation.86-100: Low Risk - Contract appears fair and balanced
